allow: Bash(node -e "const {parse} = require\('@xml-tools/parser'\); const r = parse\('<foo attr=\\"bad'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({lexErrors: r.lexErrors?.map\(e=>\({msg: e.message, line: e.line, col: e.column}\)\), parseErrors: r.parseErrors?.map\(e=>\({message: e.message, prevToken: e.previousToken?.image, prevLine: e.previousToken?.startLine, prevCol: e.previousToken?.startColumn}\)\)}, null, 2\)\)")
